overview.description: The VanEck Green Bond ETF (GRNB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Green Bond U.S. Dollar Select index. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index ofUSDbondsissued for climate change mitigation or other environmentally beneficial projects, as identified by the Climate Bonds Initiative. GRNB was launched on Mar 3, 2017 and is issued by VanEck.
infoTable: S&P Green Bond U.S. Dollar Select Index
